## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run check` passes (typecheck + lint + format + test)
- [ ] Companion example e2e gates pass when input behavior changed (`cd examples/basic-app && bun run test:e2e:android`, `cd examples/basic-app && bun run test:e2e:ios`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `docs/`) if the public API changed
- [ ] Added a changeset (`bunx changeset`) if a published package changed
